'''Tami''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] in the recon squad of the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]] under [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Makx Maganinny]] and a personal friend of fellow scout [[Odie Subu]]. He was later killed during his first combat experience in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]].

{{Char-stub}}
